# Shreyas Garg

> Builder at the intersection of AI, music, and creative technology. CS at BITS Pilani & Scaler (SST).

Shreyas Garg is a developer and builder based in India, working on AI systems, creative tools, and research. Currently a student at BITS Pilani and Scaler School of Technology (2023–2027). AI Research Intern at IIIT Delhi (Feb–Aug 2025).

## Career

- Feb 2025 - Aug 2025: AI Research Intern — IIIT Delhi
- Jul 2024 - Feb 2025: Intern — Mythyaverse
- 2023 - present: Computer Science — Scaler School of Technology
- 2023 - present: BITS Pilani
- 2022: High School — D.P.S.G.

## Projects

- **Leniency Bench**: Open benchmark for evaluating leniency and alignment boundaries in large language models across adversarial prompts. https://github.com/shreyas-garg/OpenEnv
- **MedSight**: AI tool that evaluates medical reports and simplifies complex findings into clear, actionable language. https://github.com/shreyas-garg/MedSight
- **Hail Mary Game**: Survival strategy game inspired by Andy Weir's novel. https://github.com/shreyas-garg/Project_Hail_Mary
- **NeoHire**: AI interviewer that runs dynamic technical and behavioural interviews. https://github.com/shreyas-garg/AI-interviewer
- **SideQuest**: Community space for builders to share side projects. https://github.com/shreyas-garg/Sidequest
